radicchio-and-citrus-salad.name: Radicchio And Citrus Salad

ingredients.item: Sherry vinegar or red wine vinegar

instructions: Toast almonds in a dry medium skillet over medium heat, tossing often, until beginning to brown in spots, about 3 minutes. Add 1 tsp. sugar, ¼ tsp. salt, and 2 Tbsp. water. Remove from heat and stir with a heatproof rubber spatula until water is evaporated. Sprinkle in remaining 1 Tbsp. sugar and stir until almonds are coated. Transfer to a plate and let cool. Coarsely chop.

Meanwhile, pulse burrata in a food processor to a coarse purée. It should look a little like cottage cheese. Add 2 Tbsp. oil and season with salt; pulse just to incorporate. (Or you can tear it with your hands, arrange on plates, and drizzle with the oil and sprinkle with salt.)
Toss oranges, radicchio, vinegar, and remaining 4 Tbsp. oil in a large bowl to combine; season with salt.
Divide burrata among plates and sprinkle with herbes de Provence; top with salad. Scatter almonds over.

rainbow-jello-recipe-comedera.name: Rainbow Jello Recipe

ingredients.item: 1/4 taza de leche condensada (por cada sobre de gelatina )

instructions: Lleva al fuego una taza de agua y calienta. Agrega el sobre de gelatina de fresa.
Mezcla muy bien hasta que se disuelva y cuando vaya a hervir, apaga y deja reposar.
Repite el proceso con cada uno de los sobres de las gelatinas.
Cuando ya tengas disuelto todos los sabores, vas a dividir la mezcla de cada una de las gelatinas en partes iguales.
A cada una de las mitades de las gelatinas, le vas a agregar el cuarto de taza de leche condensada.
Mezcla muy bien.
To the other half, add a cup of cold water to each and mix.
To form the rainbow gelatine, in a Silicone flat mold, add the first part of the strawberry and refrigerate gelatine for 15 minutes or until it cuts.
Una vez cuajada, vierte la gelatina de fresa con leche condensada y vuelve a cuajar.
Repite este proceso, intercalando cada una de las mezclas de la gelatina.
When you paddle the last cape, let them cut for about 30 minutes so that all of the compact jelly can be pitted.
Once you sign and lose and cut into portions. Enjoy!

rancho-canario-the-traditional-chickpea-.name: Rancho Canario, The Traditional Chickpea Stew From The Canary Islands
rancho-canario-the-traditional-chickpea-.original_name: Rancho Canario, el cocido de garbanzos tradicional de Canarias
instructions: Remoja los garbanzos desde la noche anterior en agua.
We start by preparing a socorro with a very minced onion, garlic and tomato, and at the bottom of our saucer.

Mientras se cocina, cortamos la carne de morcillo en trozos de un bocado, el pollo, y el chorizo en rodajas. Luego, las agregamos a la cacerola y las doramos con el sofrito hasta que cambien de color.

We add water with the pimenton and saffron and let them cook with low heat and sometimes remove the foam. After an hour of cooking the meat, we incorporated previously soaked chickpeas. We cook about an hour and a half.
We put the potatoes cut into pieces and put them with their hands slightly to free their starch. We cook them in the same pot for 30 more minutes and add more water if necessary.
Finally, we add noodles and cook them according to their thickness: four minutes for the finer and eight minutes for the more thick.
We serve hot as a plate and add some meat and chorizo to each plate.

raos-spaghetti-with-broken-meatball-mari.name: Rao’s Spaghetti With Broken Meatball Marinara

ingredients.prep: finely chopped, plus more for optional garnish

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions:
In a large bowl, combine the bread and milk and let sit for a few minutes. Using your hands, squeeze milk out of the bread and discard the milk. Tear the bread into pea-size or smaller pieces and return to the bowl. Add the beef, parsley, basil parmesan, egg, garlic, 1 teaspoon salt and ¼ teaspoon black pepper. Stir to combine and form into 16 meatballs.
Heat a large high-sided skillet, preferably enameled cast iron, over medium-high. Add the oil and swirl to coat. Arrange the meatballs in the skillet in a single layer and cook, until well browned on the first side, 3 minutes. Then, turn meatballs, no need to be super gently, allow them to break up slightly. Continue to cook, turning a few times, until mostly crisp and golden on the outside, about 10 minutes more. Pour the marinara into the skillet with the meatballs and gently stir to combine.
Meanwhile, bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Cook the spaghetti per package instructions until al dente. Drain and transfer to the pot with the meatballs and sauce. Toss to coat and serve with more parm & a sprinkling of parsley and basil, if desired.

raundis-swedish-pancakes.name: Raundi's Swedish Pancakes
instructions: Whisk lingonberry jam and ¼ cup melted butter together in a small bowl until well combined. Set topping aside.
Whisk milk, eggs, 2 tablespoons melted butter, and vanilla together in a large bowl until well combined.
Whisk flour, sugar, and salt together in a bowl until well mixed; gradually whisk into milk mixture until batter is smooth.

Drop ½ cup batter onto a lightly buttered skillet or crêpe pan over medium heat; swirl the skillet to spread batter. Cook until top looks dry, about 2 minutes. Flip with a spatula; cook until light golden, 1 to 2 minutes more. Transfer to a plate; spread with topping and roll up pancake. Repeat with remaining batter and topping.

raw-chia-porridge.name: Raw Chia 'porridge
instructions: Place chia seeds in a bowl.
Layer banana and dates in a blender; add almond milk, cinnamon, and salt. Blend mixture until smooth and pour over chia seeds, stirring well. Let mixture sit until thickened, at least 15 minutes.
Stir chia 'porridge' and top with blueberries.

recipe-for-chicken-thighs-with-sesame-an.name: Recipe For Chicken Thighs With Sesame And Honey Sauce
recipe-for-chicken-thighs-with-sesame-an.original_name: Receta de muslos de pollo con salsa de sésamo y miel

ingredients.item: 8 chicken thighs (with skin and bone for more flavour)
1 cdita de maicena disuelta en 2 cucharadas de agua
1 cda of minced onions (optional to decorate)

instructions: Sazona los muslos de pollo con sal y pimienta al gusto.
Warm a large frying pan with medium-high heat with vegetable and sesame oil.
Dors the chicken thighs from both sides for 5 minutes until the skin's crispy.
Put the fire down to half-low, cover the frying pan and cook for 20 minutes, occasionally turning till the chicken is well cooked.
In a bowl, mix honey, soya sauce, rice vinegar, ginger and garlic.
Add the mixture to frying pan with chicken thighs and cook with low heat for 5 minutes till chicken impregnates with flavors.
Add the malt dissolved in water and mix until the salsa thickens slightly.
Sprinkle the sesame seeds roasted on the chicken.
Remove from the fire and decorate with minced onions before serving.

recipe-for-chicken-thighs-with-tomato-an.name: Recipe For Chicken Thighs With Tomato And Basil Sauce
recipe-for-chicken-thighs-with-tomato-an.original_name: Receta de muslos de pollo con salsa de tomate y albahaca

ingredients.item: 4  tomates maduros pelados y picados  ((o una lata de 400 g de tomates enteros pelados))
1 cdite of sugar (optional to balance acidity)

instructions: Lava y seca los muslos de pollo. Sazona con sal y pimienta al gusto.
In a large frying pan, heats olive oil with medium-high heat.
He dors his thighs from both sides for 3-4 minutes by his side or until they are golden. Remove them from frying pan and reserve them.
In the same frying pan, reduce fire by half and spray onion until clear about 3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another 1 minute, and care that it doesn't get burned.
Add the minced tomatoes and tomato paste. Cooking for 5 minutes, crushing tomatoes with a spoon to free their juices.
It incorporates chicken broth, oregano, salt, pepper and sugar (if you use them). Fold well.
Keep his chicken thighs back to his frying pan and make sure they're submerged in his salsa.
Cover the frying pan and cook with low heat for 25-30 minutes, or until the chicken is fully cooked and the salsa has been slightly weighed.
Agrega la albahaca fresca justo antes de apagar el fuego, para preservar su aroma.
Serves hot!

recipe-for-chili-stuffed-with-ground-bee.name: Recipe For Chili Stuffed With Ground Beef
recipe-for-chili-stuffed-with-ground-bee.original_name: Receta de chiles rellenos de carne molida
instructions: Inicia la receta, prendiendo la hornilla. Toma los chiles y los vas a ahumar con el fuego.
When the surface of the chili is dark, withdraw from the fire.
Pasado ese tiempo, toma los chiles y retira la piel ahumada, Corta a la mitad y extrae las semillas. Reserva.
Cut onion, pimenton, tomato and garlic into notebooks.
Warm a frying pan with olive oil.
Fry garlic and add onion and mix as clear. Then add the pimenton and tomato, remove very well.
Posteriormente, agrega la carne y mezcla muy bien hasta que se integre con las verduras. Tapa y dejar cocinar por 7 minutos a fuego lento.
After that time, our flesh had to produce some fluids by steam. At that time, add salt and pepper to taste. Then tomato and paprika. It's a good mix to integrate everything.
Cover again and let cook for 8 more minutes. Destroy the meat and let all the fluids be reduced. It should be dry but with some juice. Let them cool as they have to be at room temperature to fill.
To purify your oven at 180 and 3.
Toma tus chiles y rellena muy bien con la carne.
Coloca en una bandeja y esparce el queso mozzarella.
Hornea por 15 minutos aproximadamente para que gratinen.
Pasado ese tiempo, y sirve con alguna salsa de tomate o de chile y con la crema agria.
Enjoy!

recipe-for-chinese-dumplings-stuffed-wit.name: Recipe For Chinese Dumplings Stuffed With Pork
recipe-for-chinese-dumplings-stuffed-wit.original_name: Receta de empanadillas chinas rellenas de cerdo

ingredients.item: 200 gr de carne de cerdo picada

instructions: In a medium bowl mix pork, Chinese cheesebacker, egg, some soya sauce, maicena and some drops of sesame oil. Let this mixture be put to rest for 1 hour in the refrigerator.
Take with one hand the empanadillas and with the other put them in the middle a tablespoon of the pilling mixture.
Now you're gonna put together the edges of the dough with your fingers moist in water so they stick more easily. Just make sure they're closed and they're clear and nothing.
Repeat this process with all empanadilla mass sheets till they are complete.

recipe-to-prepare-egg-toast-in-5-minutes.name: Recipe To Prepare Egg Toast In 5 Minutes
recipe-to-prepare-egg-toast-in-5-minutes.original_name: Receta para preparar tostadas de huevo en 5 minutos
instructions: Fold your frying pan and leave it with fire low to half
Put the bread into the frying pan and with a cup put a circle at the centre of the bread but without breaking it
Gira el pan para que se cocine por el otro lado
Turn back to the side you did the circle and mark your circle again
Break the egg and place it right into the bread circle
Salpimienta al gusto
Cover the frying pan and add some water close to the edges of the cover so that steam helps cook the egg
Cuando tome la consistencia que deseas, destapa y apaga el fuego
Sirve y disfruta

red-cabbage-slow-slaw.name: Red Cabbage Slow Slaw

ingredients.prep: cored and sliced as thinly as possible

instructions: Put sliced cabbage into a large sealable plastic bag.

Whisk red wine vinegar, sugar, balsamic vinegar, salt, onion powder, seasoned salt, and black pepper together in a bowl; pour into bag with the cabbage. Massage the bag to ensure cabbage is completely coated with liquid. Squeeze as much air from the bag as possible and seal.
Marinate cabbage in refrigerator, massaging the bag several times a day, until the cabbage is softened and the marinade is deep purple in color, at least 2 days.
Pour olive oil into the bag and mix with the cabbage mixture. Seal bag and refrigerate 1 hour more before serving.

red-enchiladas-comedera.name: Red Enchiladas

ingredients.item: Filling: lean ground turkey gennie-o ® (cheese and onion.)
Opcional: decorar con queso fresco (lechuga y/o crema agria.)

instructions: Remove the seeds from the chilies, with the exception of those from the tree chilies (if you don't want the salsa to be hot, do not add the 2 tree chilies).
It steals chilies (guajillo, California and tree chiles).
Add steamed chilies to a blender with some pot water (about 2 cups of water, depending on how bad a salsa wants).
Add a pint of dry oregano, 2 garlic and salt teeth to taste and lycée.
Once the salsa has been liquefied, pour it into a frying pan with 1 tablespoon of oil. When the salsa starts to boil, keep it under fire.

In another frying pan, add oil and heat it with high heat. The quantity of oil will depend on the size of the frying pan and how many tortillas you can fry at once. There's got to be enough oil to cover the tortillas as you dive them.

First, sink tortillas into hot red sauce and then into hot oil. (Tip: Use cold tortillas so they don't get rid of them as they are submerged into the oil). The time at the oil should only be a few seconds to smooth.
Apila las tortillas calientes en un plato y, una vez que hayas terminado de sumergir todas las tortillas, es momento de agregar el relleno.
Add pilling with lean ground turkey JENNIE-O ®.
Add the toppings mentioned above.
If you have some more salsa, you can put it up with the enchiladas for more flavour.

red-pepperanchovy-toasts.name: Red Pepper–anchovy Toasts

ingredients.prep:
quartered, ribs and seeds removed, flesh
sliced into thin strips

ingredients.item:
Guindilla peppers or other small pickled chiles (depending on
heat preference)
. sherry vinegar or red wine vinegar

ingredients.prep:
oil-packed anchovies,
or other cured fish (from at least a 1.7-oz. container)

instructions: Toss ½ small white onion, halved, thinly sliced, ½ small red bell pepper, quartered, ribs and seeds removed, flesh sliced into thin strips, 3–4 guindilla peppers or other small pickled chiles (depending on heat preference), finely chopped, 1 Tbsp. sherry vinegar or red wine vinegar, ½ tsp. sugar, 2 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil, and a large pinch of kosher salt in a medium bowl until vegetables are coated. Taste and season with more salt if needed. Let pepper mixture sit at least 10 minutes and up to 30 minutes.

Heat remaining 2 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in a large cast-iron or stainless-steel skillet over medium. Working in batches and adding more oil if needed, cook ½ baguette, sliced on a diagonal ⅓" thick, until golden brown and crisp, about 3 minutes per side.

Arrange bread on a platter or plates and rub one side with 1–2 garlic cloves. Place 1–2 boquerones (marinated white anchovies), oil-packed anchovies, or other cured fish (from at least a 1.7-oz. container), skin side up, on each slice, for a total of 8–10, then spoon pepper mixture over.

red-velvet-and-white-chocolate-chunk-coo.name: Red Velvet And White Chocolate Chunk Cookies
instructions: {'step': '1', 'instruction': 'Preheat the oven to 175 degrees C (177°C). Line a cookie sheet with parchment paper.'}
{'step': '2', 'instruction': 'Beat butter in a mixing bowl with an electric mixer until fluffy. Slowly mix in cake mix and flour until combined.'}
{'step': '3', 'instruction': 'Add egg and beat until mixed completely. Add white chocolate chunks and mix until well combined, about 1 minute.'}
{'step': '4', 'instruction': 'Form dough into 2.5cm balls and place on the prepared sheet.'}
{'step': '5', 'instruction': 'Bake in the preheated oven for 8 to 10 minutes. Cool on the baking sheet for 1 minute before removing to a wire rack to cool completely, 25 to 30 minutes.'}

refried-beans.name: Refried Beans

ingredients.item: Pico de gallo and crumbled queso fresco

instructions: Bring onion, bell pepper, garlic, beans, pork, salt, and 3 quarts water to a boil in a large pot. Reduce heat to medium and cook, uncovered, stirring occasionally and adding boiling water if needed to cover, until beans are tender, 2–2½ hours.

Working in 2 batches, heat ½ cup lard in a large skillet (preferably cast iron) over high. Fry 6 cups beans and their liquid (they will splatter, so be careful) until most of the liquid has evaporated, about 10 minutes. Smash beans in skillet with a potato masher until mixture is thick and no whole beans remain (refried beans should still be pourable at this point, but will thicken as they sit). Transfer to a large bowl. Repeat with remaining beans and ½ cup lard.

Top refried beans with pico de gallo and queso fresco.
Do Ahead: Beans, before frying, can be made 3 months ahead; freeze in an airtight container.


Editor's note: This recipe was originally published in August 2016.

retro-ground-beef-casserole-with-biscuit.name: Retro Ground Beef Casserole With Biscuits
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Lightly coat a baking dish with cooking spray.
Heat oil in a sauté pan over medium-high heat. Add carrots, onions, and celery; sauté until onions translucent, 5 to 7 minutes.
Meanwhile, heat a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add ground beef; cook and stir until browned and crumbly, 5 to 7 minutes. Drain; discard grease.

Move beef to one side of skillet; add butter and melt over medium heat. Whisk in flour, a little at a time until combined. Whisk in beef broth. Add sautéed vegetables, garlic salt, onion powder, garlic powder, and black pepper. Bring to a boil; cover and remove from heat.

Meanwhile, add baking mix to a bowl; stir in buttermilk until a soft dough forms. Transfer dough to a piece of waxed paper; roll to 1/2-inch thickness. Cut out biscuits with a 2 ½-inch round biscuit cutter dipped in baking mix.
Pour beef mixture into prepared baking dish; top with biscuits.
Bake in the preheated oven until biscuits browned, 24 to 25 minutes.

rhubarb-cheesecake-muffins.name: Rhubarb Cheesecake Muffins
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Line 18 muffin cups with paper liners.
Combine cream cheese and 3 tablespoons sugar together in a bowl; set filling aside.
Combine ½ cup sugar and cinnamon together in a separate bowl; cut in butter until crumbly. Set topping aside.

Combine flour, baking soda, baking powder, and salt in a bowl. Combine brown sugar, buttermilk, oil, egg, vanilla extract, and vanilla butter and nut flavoring in a separate bowl; stir in flour mixture until blended. Stir in rhubarb.
Spoon batter into the prepared muffin cups, filling each ⅓ full; top with 1 tablespoon filling. Spoon more batter to completely cover filling; sprinkle with topping.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into centers comes out mostly clean, about 20 minutes.

rice-with-apricots-and-plums-lezzet.name: Rice With Apricots And Plums
instructions: 1. Heat the olive oil in the pot.
2. Almond, peanut and üzü add and roast in jealous fire.
3. Wash and drained ricenç add and continue roasting.
4. Add spices, salt and sugar and add water.
5. Close the cover and bake the water in the jealous fire & the cover until the time of the fire.
6. Take the cover from January to 10 minutes from open
7. Add and blend the chopped stream.

rice-with-brothy-shrimp-recipe-comedera.name: Rice With Brothy Shrimp Recipe
rice-with-brothy-shrimp-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de arroz con gambas caldoso

ingredients.item: A little yellow dye (if you have saffron, much better)

instructions: Fold garlic, onion and pimenton into a big pot. Add pepper, salt, bay, rice and stir a few minutes.
Agrega 4 tazas de caldo de gambas. Revuelve y deja hervir un rato, revisando si hace falta corregir la sal. Agrega el colorante amarillo en este paso.
The water will evaporate and you should never let them dry. Try to have a finger above the rice (remember that the plate should be bald). That's why you're using the stock mentioned earlier.
When the rice is about 3 / 4 of cooking place the peas, a few minutes after the shrimp, and finally the chewed parsley well small.
When you feel that the rice's ready for your taste, it's actually ready. Take them from the fire and serve them.

rice-with-calamari-recipe-step-by-step-c.name: Rice With Calamari Recipe Step By Step
rice-with-calamari-recipe-step-by-step-c.original_name: Receta de Arroz con Calamares paso a paso

ingredients.item: 1 medium onion minced into small pieces
2 teeth with very small chopped garlic
1  cucharadita de pasta de tomate concentrado

instructions: Clean up your squids and get them on wheels. Save them.

Warm up a paellea, pot or deep frying pan with olive oil and pour garlic teeth, onion, pepper and tomatoes (in that order) for a few minutes. Add salt and pepper to let go of the juices. If it's bad for you, you can put a little cayenne pepper as well to give your rice a pint with squid.
Put up the squids. Do them 5 minutes by stirring constantly. At this moment you can put the teaspoon of tomato paste to strengthen taste and color the preparation.
Agrega el arroz y seguidamente las 2 tazas del caldo de camarones. Puedes sustituir por un poco de caldo de pescado o de vegetales si prefieres.
Corrige la sal y pimienta y deja hervir.
Add the small chopped parsley.
In what reduces the liquid low fire and cover.
Cooking for 20 minutes or till the grain of rice is ready and serves with an olive oil jet above.

rice-with-summer-squash-red-peppers-and-.name: Rice With Summer Squash, Red Peppers, And Roasted Peppers
instructions: Heat oil in heavy large saucepan over medium-high heat. Add onion and cook until soft, stirring frequently, about 4 minutes. Add bell pepper, yellow zucchini, and green zucchini; sauté until vegetables begin to soften, about 3 minutes. Add rice; sauté 1 minute, stirring constantly. Sprinkle with salt and pepper. Add broth, increase heat to high, and bring to boil. Reduce heat to low, cover, and cook until rice is tender, 18 to 20 minutes. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Stir in pumpkin seeds and parsley.

roast-ham-with-stout-beer-and-potatoes-t.name: Roast Ham With Stout Beer And Potatoes
roast-ham-with-stout-beer-and-potatoes-t.original_name: Pernil assado com cerveja stout e batatinhas
instructions: Have the ham in a large, wide pot and season with salt and pepper. Add the chopped onions and garlic, pepper paste, tomato pulp, rosemary, beer and water. Tape, take it to the fire and let it cook in medium heat for 40 minutes. Turn the ham in the middle of the cooking.
After the specified time, remove the ham from the pan and place it on a tray. Spread the potatoes around, sprinkle them with chopped coriander and water everything with olive oil and ham sauce.
Take it in the oven, preheated to 190oC, for about 45 minutes. In the end, make sure the potatoes are well baked and serve immediately.

roast-pork-with-fennel-and-apple-salad.name: Roast Pork With Fennel And Apple Salad

ingredients.prep: guajillo, or New Mexico chiles, seeds removed
fronds reserved, bulb cored, very thinly sliced

ingredients.item: Honeycrisp or other crunchy not-too-sour apple
A spice mill or mortar and pestle

instructions: Cook chiles, star anise, fennel seeds, coriander seeds, cumin seeds, peppercorns, and cloves in a dry small skillet over medium heat, stirring often, until slightly darkened and fragrant, about 2 minutes. Let cool. Set one-fourth of spice mixture aside.

Blend garlic, vinegar, ¼ cup oil, and ¼ cup water in a blender until smooth. Add remaining toasted spices and blend, adding splashes of water if needed to help turn the blades, until chile paste is mostly smooth; some texture is okay.

Season pork with 1 tsp. kosher salt per pound (check the butcher’s sticker on the package to see the weight of what you purchased). Smear half of chile paste all over pork; transfer to a wire rack set inside a rimmed baking sheet or a roasting pan and let sit at room temperature at least 2 hours, or cover and chill up to 12 hours.

Finely grind reserved spice mixture in a spice mill or with mortar and pestle. Transfer to a small skillet; stir in remaining ¼ cup oil. Set over medium heat and cook, stirring, until spices have darkened slightly and are fragrant, about 1 minute. Let spice oil cool, then transfer to an airtight container. Cover and set aside.

Preheat oven to 275°. Roast pork until paste is darkened and looks dried out and an instant-read thermometer inserted into the center registers 120°, 1½–2 hours, depending on the size. Make sure to take the temperature in more than one spot as there will be thick and thin parts of the roast. Let rest 2 hours.

Preheat oven to 500°. Rub pork with reserved chile paste and roast until marinade has formed a fragrant crust and an instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part registers 130°, 8–12 minutes. Transfer pork to a cutting board and let rest 15 minutes. Thinly slice and transfer to a platter. Spoon reserved spice oil over pork; sprinkle with sea salt.
Toss fennel bulb and fronds, apple, lime zest and juice, chiles, and cilantro in a large bowl; season salad with salt. Drizzle oil over and toss to coat. Serve pork with salad.

roasted-pita-recipe-lezzet.name: Roasted Pita Recipe
instructions: 1. Drink preparation harper for first onion small cubeunch in the pan and so on to light pink.
2. Then add the green peppers you've filled in the pan and provide them with a few min mixing softeners.

14 July Cook the pidelar from 200°C in the oven, üzers from beautiful to fry.

roasted-rosemary-garlic-loaf.name: Roasted Rosemary Garlic Loaf
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200°C).

Remove the top of each garlic bulb so just the tops of the cloves are exposed. Set the tops aside. Drizzle 1–2 tablespoons of olive oil over top of each bulb, letting the oil seep down between the cloves. Season each bulb with ¼ teaspoon of salt. Place the tops back on each bulb and set in a shallow baking dish.

Bake for 20–25 minutes, until the cloves are completely tender, but not mushy. Since the garlic will continue cooking in the bread, you want them a little more firm so they hold their shape in the loaf.
Let the garlic to cool until safe to handle. Gentle press on the bottom of each clove to pop it out of its skin. Roughly chop the garlic cloves and set aside.
In a large bowl, combine the bread flour, whole wheat flour, chopped garlic, rosemary, and the remaining 2 teaspoons of salt. Stir well with a rubber spatula.
In a separate large bowl, combine the warm water, remaining ¼ cup (60 ml) olive oil, and the yeast.

Add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients and use a rubber spatula to stir until the dough just comes together. With your hands, knead the dough in the bowl until there are no dry, floury spots remaining. Cover with a kitchen towel and let rest in a warm place for 60 minutes, or until almost doubled in size.
Using the spatula, fold the dough toward the center again 8 more times, rotating the bowl each time. Cover with the towel and let rest for 30 minutes more.
Place a Dutch oven with a lid in the oven, and preheat the oven to 232°C (230°C) for 30 minutes.

Lightly dust a clean surface and your hands with flour. Carefully turn the dough out of the bowl onto the floured surface. Fold the edges of the dough towards the center 8 times, then flip the dough over and transfer to a piece of parchment paper.
Carefully remove the Dutch oven from the oven (it will be very hot) and use the parchment to lift the bread into the pot. Cover with the lid.
Bake the bread for 30 minutes. Remove the lid and reduce the oven temperature to 218°C (220°C). Bake for 20 more minutes, until the bread is golden brown.
Carefully slide the bread out of the pot and onto a wire rack. Remove the parchment paper and let the bread cool for at least 1 hour before slicing.
Slice the bread and serve as desired.
Enjoy!

roasted-spinach-with-pastrami-lezzet.name: Roasted Spinach With Pastrami
instructions: 1. Transfer it to a large pot after washing and leaking the spinach.
2. Add 1 glass of water on the middle fire, pour 5 minutes.
3. Take the water from January and the fine coast.
4. Heat the oils in the pot.
5. Add spinachs and roast a few minutes.
6. Add boiled rice, roast for a few minutes.
7. Add fine chopped rusts, add the bonds of rusts.
8. After a few minutes roasting, open slots to break eggs.
9. Cook the eggs to the inside and white parts by closing a cover until the prying.
10. Take a fresh black pepper from January and make hot service.

roasted-sweet-potato-wedges.name: Roasted Sweet Potato Wedges

ingredients.item: Freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Position a rack in the upper third of the oven, and preheat to 232°C (230 degrees C).
Mix together olive oil, garlic, and rosemary in a small bowl.

Cut sweet potato lengthwise into 1 1/2-inch thick wedges; place in a large bowl. Season with salt and pepper and drizzle with oil mixture; toss gently to coat. Arrange wedges on a large baking sheet in a single layer so they are not touching.
Bake in the preheated oven, turning once, until potatoes are softened and lightly browned, about 20 minutes. Carefully remove from the baking sheet.

robins-blond-brownies.name: Robin's Blond Brownies
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease a 11x7x2-inch baking pan.
Beat the butter and brown sugar with an electric mixer in a large bowl until smooth. Beat the first egg into the butter until completely blended, then beat in the vanilla with the last egg.

Mix flour, baking powder, and salt together in a separate bowl; add to the butter mixture and stir until just incorporated into a batter. Fold chocolate chips, butterscotch chips, and pecans into the batter; spread into the prepared baking dish.

Bake in the preheated oven until the top is dry and the edges have started to pull away from the sides of the pan, 25 to 30 minutes. Cool brownies in pan for 10 minutes before moving to a wire rack to cool completely.

rosemary-and-thyme-braised-lamb-shoulder.name: Rosemary And Thyme Braised Lamb Shoulder

ingredients.item: A heavy 6 1/2 - 7 quart nonreactive heavy pot with a tight fitting lid
ingredients.prep: or a heavy-duty nonreactive roasting pan with heavy-duty foil

instructions: Make slits in lamb shoulder all over at 2-inch intervals with a paring knife.

Pound garlic with kosher salt, zest, and 1/2 teaspoon black pepper to a coarse paste with mortar and pestle (or mince and mash with a large knife), then stir together with oil and 1 tablespoon each of rosemary and thyme. Rub paste all over lamb. Put in heavy pot or roasting pan, then chill, covered, 12 to 24 hours.
Bring roast to room temperature (about 1 hour).
Preheat oven to 177°C with rack in lower third.

Pour wine and water around lamb and add herb sprigs. Cover roast with a sheet of parchment. Cover pot with lid or cover roasting pan tightly with heavy-duty foil. Braise lamb in oven until tender but not falling off the bone, about 3 hours.

Increase oven to 232°C and remove parchment, then braise lamb, covered with lid (or foil), until very tender and top is browned, about 1 hour more. Carefully transfer lamb to a platter and loosely cover with foil. Let it stand 10 minutes.

Pour braising liquid through a fine-mesh sieve, then spoon off and discard fat remaining on liquid (you should have about 2 cups liquid; reserve pot). Whisk together flour and 1 cup liquid in a small bowl until smooth. Bring remaining liquid to a boil in uncleaned pot, then whisk in flour mixture and boil, whisking, until thickened, about 4 minutes. Stir in thyme and rosemary and season with salt and pepper.
Remove and discard strings. Meat is too tender to slice with a carving knife; use a meat fork to pull meat into serving pieces.

rose-all-day-cocktail.name: Rosé All Day Cocktail
instructions: Muddle the strawberries in a mixing glass or cocktail shaker. Add the rosé, Aperol, and lemon juice, and stir to incorporate. Pour into a wineglass, add a handful of ice cubes, and top with a splash of soda water.

rustic-cabbage-soup-teleculinaria.name: Rustic Cabbage Soup
instructions: Wash the cabbage leaves and cut them in thin julian (green broth). Peel the potatoes and cut them roughly. Get the leek and cut it in circles. Peel the garlic and onion and cut the last one in buds.
Put all the vegetables in a pot, add the whole sausage, add the water, season with salt and let it cook for 20 minutes.

After the time indicated, remove the sausage from the pot and cut it into thin slices. Crush the soup, reassemble the sausage and add the cabbage. Let boil and boil for another 10 minutes, then water with a thread of olive oil and serve.

rustic-shrimp-toasts.name: Rustic Shrimp Toasts

ingredients.prep: peeled, deveined, rinsed, patted dry, halved lengthwise

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt
Plus 2 tbsp. store-bought or homemade aioli

instructions: Heat broiler (set to low if you have that option). Mix shrimp, scallions, capers, red pepper flakes, salt, and ½ cup aioli in a medium bowl to combine. Spread bread slices with remaining 2 Tbsp. aioli.

Arrange shrimp, cut side down, in a snug, even layer on bread, all the way to the edges. Pack capers and scallions on, under, and between shrimp—wherever they will fit. Press shrimp mixture into the bread to ensure good contact. Place on a plate and chill at least 10 minutes and up to 30 minutes (this will help shrimp better adhere to bread).

Heat 1 Tbsp. oil in a large ovenproof skillet over high. Cook 2 toasts, bread side down, 15 seconds, then transfer skillet to oven. Broil, watching toasts carefully, until golden and crisp in spots and shrimp turn pink and curl slightly, 5–7 minutes. (Broiler heat varies widely, so check on toasts every minute or so.) Transfer toasts to a cutting board. Repeat with remaining 1 Tbsp. oil and 2 toasts.
Cut each toast in half and transfer to a platter. Sprinkle with parsley and serve with lemon wedges for squeezing over.
